**What problem does this solve?**
Describe the gap or pain point.

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like implemented.

**Component**
- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] Backend (oracle aggregation)
- [ ] Contract (mint/burn/liquidation)
- [ ] Docs

**Complexity estimate (maintainer will confirm)**
- [ ] Trivial
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] High — especially anything touching contract financial logic
